---
title: "Publications, Posters & Talks"
---

## Recent Talks

- **2025 APS Global Summit** -- Leblond
  [[PDF](https://sites.psu.edu/lleblond/files/2025/03/2025_APS_Leblond.pdf)]

## Papers

::: {.pub-entry}
[Using digital prompts to support physics students' self-regulated learning]{.pub-title}\
[Leblond, L., Wang, Y., Malcos, J., and Sperling, R.]{.pub-authors}\
[*Phys. Rev. Phys. Educ. Res.* 22, 010114, 2026]{.pub-venue}\
[[Journal](https://journals.aps.org/prper/abstract/10.1103/cftx-hfw5)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[RASE: Modeling cumulative disadvantage due to marginalized group status in academia]{.pub-title}\
[Shandera, S., Matsick, J. L., Hunter, D. R., & Leblond, L.]{.pub-authors}\
[*PLOS ONE*, 16(12), e0260567]{.pub-venue}\
[[Journal](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0260567)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Designing Laboratories for Online Instruction using the iOLab Device]{.pub-title}\
[Louis Leblond and Melissa Hicks]{.pub-authors}\
[*The Physics Teacher* 59(5), 351--355]{.pub-venue}\
[[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2006.15181)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Mastering Physics Efficacy Report]{.pub-title}\
[Christine Leow, Kenneth Lee, Yun Jin Rho, Louis Leblond, Eric Hudson]{.pub-authors}\
[Presented at AERA, 2018]{.pub-venue}\
[[Correlational Study (PDF)](https://www.pearson.com/content/dam/one-dot-com/one-dot-com/global/Files/efficacy-and-research/reports/Pearson-Mastering-Physics-Correlational-Technical-Report.pdf)] [[Longitudinal Study (PDF)](https://www.pearson.com/content/dam/one-dot-com/one-dot-com/global/Files/efficacy-and-research/reports/Pearson-Mastering-Physics-Longitudinal-Technical-Report.pdf)]
:::

## Posters

::: {.pub-entry}
[Exploring Undergraduate Students' Experiences with Standards-Based Grading]{.pub-title}\
[Russ deForest, Debbie Gaydos, Neil Hatfield, Eric Hudson, Joe Houck, Louis Leblond and Michael Steward]{.pub-authors}\
[Presented at RUME 24 and PERC 24]{.pub-venue}\
[[Poster (PDF)](https://sites.psu.edu/lleblond/files/2024/07/PERC2024_poster.pdf)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[The Differential Impact of Instructors on Students Attitudes by Gender]{.pub-title}\
[Mar Alegre, Nicholas Atkinson, Eric Hudson and Louis Leblond]{.pub-authors}\
[Presented at SABER West, Jan 2024]{.pub-venue}\
[[Poster (PDF)](https://sites.psu.edu/lleblond/files/2024/02/GenderDifference-e5e41c61ecf65f93.pdf)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Open-ended, Investigative E&M Labs with the iOLab]{.pub-title}\
[Louis Leblond, Eric Hudson]{.pub-authors}\
[Presented at AAPT Summer 2017]{.pub-venue}\
[[Poster (PDF)](https://sites.psu.edu/lleblond/files/2019/08/poster.pdf)]
:::

## More

- [arXiv publications](https://arxiv.org/search/?query=Leblond%2C+Louis&searchtype=all&source=header)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=bIXsdYYAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao)
